# szimnau.dk

> Real-world Home Assistant guides, hardware reviews, and automation blueprints by Rolf Szimnau — an IT advisor and home automation enthusiast based in Denmark. All content is based on personal, hands-on experience with actual hardware running in a live smart home setup.

Rolf Szimnau writes in-depth technical guides covering Home Assistant integrations, automation blueprints, dashboard design, and hardware reviews. The site is multilingual (English, Danish, German). Content is practical and specific — configurations, YAML, CSS, and real outcomes rather than theory.

## Blog

- [Google Find My in Home Assistant: Track Devices on a Dark Dashboard](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/google-find-my-home-assistant/): Full setup guide for the FMDN integration — fixes the 'unavailable' state on startup, dark-themes the Leaflet map via shadow DOM injection, resolves the Galaxy Tab A9 avatar bug, and explains when FMDN isn't the right tool versus an ESP32 BLE proxy.
- [Home Assistant Recorder: Cut Database Growth from 160 MB/day to Under 50 MB](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/ha-recorder-database-optimization/): The exact recorder configuration that reduced daily SQLite database growth by over 70% — full YAML with exclusion globs for Tado diagnostics, unavailable entities, update domain, and UniFi AP stats.
- [Window Opens, Heating Stops — A Blueprint for Every Room](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/window-heating-automation/): How I automated the radiator in Louise's room to turn off when the window opens and back on when it closes — built as a reusable Blueprint so the next room takes 30 seconds to add.
- [Nightly Health Checks for Home Assistant — GitHub Actions as Your Watchdog](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/ha-nightly-health-check/): How I built a nightly CI pipeline that runs 22 tests against my live Home Assistant setup and automatically opens a GitHub issue when something breaks — before I notice it myself.
- [Škoda Elroq + Home Assistant — Six Months In](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/skoda-elroq-home-assistant/): What the MyŠkoda integration actually gives you in Home Assistant, what's missing, and how I built a useful EV dashboard with a battery progress bar and calendar-triggered pre-conditioning.
- [Charging a Car on Danish Spot Prices — What I Actually Built](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/danish-electricity-prices-ev-charging/): Using Energi Data Service in Home Assistant to track hourly spot prices, find the cheapest charging window, and automate Škoda Elroq charging without touching the app.
- [Reolink CX810 in Home Assistant — License Plate Reading and TV Snapshots](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/sentinel-reolink-alpr-tv/): How I got a Reolink CX810 4K PoE camera to read license plates with AI and push a snapshot straight to the TV when someone pulls into the driveway.
- [Camera Notifications That Actually Tell You Something](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/sentinel-ai-camera-ha/): How I got the Sentinel camera to send useful, actionable alerts instead of 40 motion pings a day — one automation, a mute toggle, and action buttons.
- [Bosch Dishwasher in Home Assistant — Schedule by Electricity Price](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/ha-appliances-dashboard/): How I connected the Bosch dishwasher via Home Connect, built a dashboard with programme selection and finish-time control, and added a button that finds the cheapest hour to run it.
- [Running Home Assistant on Proxmox — The Right Way](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/proxmox-home-assistant-setup/): Moving Home Assistant from Raspberry Pi 4 to a Dell OptiPlex 7060 on Proxmox VE — VM sizing, USB passthrough, and why snapshots changed how I handle updates.
- [Roborock in Home Assistant — The Map, the Rooms, and What's Actually Useful](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/roborock-interactive-map-ha/): Setting up the Roborock S5 Max in Home Assistant with an interactive map card, room-segment cleaning, and the maintenance tracking that will eventually save you from a burnt-out brush.
- [Running Sonos and Google Nest Speakers as One System in Home Assistant](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/sonos-google-nest-home-assistant/): Unifying a Sonos speaker with four Google Nest Audio speakers via Home Assistant scripts — no third-party bridges, no subscription.
- [Tado + card_mod — Making a Heating Dashboard Worth Looking At](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/tado-home-assistant-dashboard/): How I set up 5 Tado zones in Home Assistant with mushroom climate cards, a CSS breathing animation for active heating, and presence-based setback that actually works.
- [Circadian Lighting With WiZ — Color Temperature That Follows the Sun](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/wiz-circadian-lighting/): How I built a circadian lighting system using WiZ bulbs and the HA sun entity — no third-party integration, just a single automation that maps solar elevation to colour temperature every 30 minutes.
- [WiZ Lights That React to the TV — Cinema Mode Without the Button](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/wiz-movie-lights/): How I automated the living room lights to dim when a movie starts, brighten on pause, and restore fully when the TV turns off — no scene button, no voice command.
- [Outdoor Lights on a Sunset Schedule — Govee and LEDVANCE](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/outdoor-lights-sunset-schedule/): How I stopped manually adjusting the outdoor light timer twice a year — a simple HA automation that turns on Govee and LEDVANCE string lights at sunset and off at midnight, every season.
- [TV Auto-Pause When the Phone Rings — Regular Calls and Messenger](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/tv-pause-phone-calls/): One automation that pauses the TV the moment either phone rings — regular mobile calls resume automatically, Messenger video calls get an actionable notification button.
- [Home Assistant Morning Briefing — TTS with Calendar, Weather, and Electricity Price](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/ha-morning-briefing-tts/): How I built a daily 06:00 spoken briefing in Home Assistant using Google AI TTS, calendar.get_events across three family calendars, EV charge status, Waze commute traffic, live electricity price, and a garbage collection countdown.
- [A Family Calendar in Home Assistant — Four People, One View](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/ha-calendar-view/): How I combined four Google Calendars plus waste collection into a single colour-coded HA view that replaced the wall calendar we'd had for years.
- [A Home Screen That Shows Less — Context-Aware Cards in Home Assistant](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/ha-context-aware-home-screen/): How I built an HA home screen where every card earns its place: conditional cards that appear only when something is active, a priority alert ticker, and a Škoda section that changes based on whether the charger is connected.
- [Building a Consistent HA Dashboard with Glassmorphism — The CSS That Actually Works](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/ha-glassmorphism-dashboard-design/): The six CSS constants I use across every card on three Home Assistant dashboards, plus the patterns for progress bars, map cards, and suppressing the Frosted Glass Dark theme's ::before overlay.
- [MailBoxGuard: LoRa Mailbox Sensor 200 Metres from the House](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/mailboxguard-lora-home-assistant/): How I wired a PricelessToolkit MailBoxGuard to an AliExpress LoRa gateway, got instant push notifications when mail arrives, and haven't touched the battery in over a year.
- [Mammotion Flora in Home Assistant — What Actually Works](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/blog/mammotion-flora-ha-integration/): Mammotion Flora (Luba Mini 2) in Home Assistant: GPS boundary mowing, weather-aware scheduling, and the satellite count quirk nobody warns you about.

## Site

- [About Rolf Szimnau](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/about/): Background, role, and the hardware stack behind the site.
- [Hardware Lab](https://www.szimnau.dk/en/#hardware-lab): Full list of devices actively running in the setup — Dell OptiPlex 7060, Home Assistant OS, Home Assistant Connect ZBT-2 (Thread Border Router), UniFi, Reolink CX810, Roborock S5 Max, Mammotion Luba Mini 2, Škoda Elroq, Tado, Sonos, WiZ, LEDVANCE, Govee, IKEA Home Smart (Thread), Bosch Home Connect, Mill Norway, ESPHome sensors.
